name: savings
instructions:
["Luke and Lisa have a special joint savings account together. At the end of each month, they each independently make a single deposit to their account to save as much money as possible. If Luke and Lisa together save over 83 dollars by the end of the month, then their bank deposits a bonus into their account.

Based on the average amount of money Luke and Lisa each save per month, the bank often deposits a bonus into their account.","We will show you how much money each person saved for 40 months in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual months. For each month, you will be asked whether their bank deposited a bonus into their account.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how much money is saved by each person on average."]
learning: {"stim1":"Luke saved ","stim2":". ","stim3":"Lisa saved ","stim4":".","question":"Did the bank deposit a bonus into their savings account this month?","alert":"Remember that the bank deposits a bonus into their savings account whenever Luke and Lisa save more than 83 dollars in total."}

judgment: {"reminder":"As a reminder, the bank deposits a bonus into their savings account if they save over 83 dollars during that month.","vignette":"During this month, Luke saved 84 dollars, and Lisa saved 84 dollars. Together, they saved 168 dollars. So, the bank deposited a bonus into their savings account.","statement":"Luke saving 84 dollars caused the bank to deposit a bonus into their savings account this month."}

","a":"

"}
